query: IORT intraoperative radiation therapy recurrent cervical cancer pelvic exenteration dose applicator guidelines

results.title: Outcomes Of Intraoperative Radiotherapy (Iort) For Spinal Tumours.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 35466650. 2022/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: The spinal column is a major site of neoplastic proliferation where 
decisions regarding surgical or radiotherapeutic intervention are based upon 
spinal instability neoplastic score (SINS). A novel technique named 
'Intraoperative radiotherapy (IORT) was proposed where surgery and radiotherapy 
were performed in the same session. During our literature search, we found no 
published systematic review or meta-analysis regarding the outcomes of IO
